授業目的: This course survey the history of Japan-China relations from the mid-19th century to the present day. While focusing on social and cultural issues, it positions such topics in the context of Japan's economic and political development as well as global trends.
到達目標: After taking this course students will gain a broad understanding of the history of the bilateral relations between Japan and China as well as familiarity with relevant main theoretical perspectives.
特記事項: 【合併】総合日本学習科目（日中関係論）（CIEC）/Japan-China Relations（国際学部）

第1回: [Startup] Watch: Ezra Vogel, China and Japan. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8310X-havS8
Watch video and be prepared to discuss in class.
第4回: [Core] China and Japan Opening to the West
第5回: [Core] Japan and China & the Emerging Modern East Asian Order
第6回: [Core] Japan and China & the Emerging Modern East Asian Order
第11回: [Core] The Second World War and the Cold War

教科書/Required texts0: Readings available in LUNA or free online.

成績評価Grading2: プレゼンテーション・発表／Presentation (07)
